title: pi-minimal-editor extension settings
description: Schema for the `extensionSettings["pi-minimal-editor"]` block of Pi's settings.json (~/.pi/agent/settings.json globally, .pi/settings.json per-project). Project values override global values; thinking-level overrides merge.

colors.description: Override the Pi accent ("pi") and per-thinking-level border colors.

pi.description: Base accent color. Replaces the theme's `accent` for the `pi` label and current-path text.

thinking.description: Per-thinking-level border colors. Each key replaces the corresponding theme token.
